programs.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programs.desc: A woman's life is at risk and she doesn't know, a man on a boat goes overboard when confronted, and police close in on a stolen prestige car.

programs.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programs.desc: Police must act quickly when a desperate and dangerous bank robber is on the run.

programs.title: Desert Collectors
programs.desc: Nigel travels to the south coast of Western Australia to the beautiful town of Albany where he meets Phil, and it's E Type Jaguar heaven. Nigel gets to race an E Type Jaguar in the Albany Classic.

programs.title: Desert Collectors
programs.desc: Nigel travels to Perth, Western Australia, to catch up with Geoff and his incredible collection. From the bizarre to the macabre to the absolutely unbelievable, this collection will leave you spellbound.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Emily brings her mother along with her to Walnut, and Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage. Kenny gets some advice from a music legend, while Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.
